name: Fire Code High-Piled Combustible Storage Permit (CFC Ch. 32)
what_it_does: Requires a fire-department permit and fire-protection features for high-piled combustible storage; the controlling authority is the local fire agency (e.g. VCFD in Ventura County).
jurisdiction: Local fire authority (CUPA fire / fire district)

hypotheses.question: Does the facility's combustible storage configuration require a high-piled storage permit from the local fire authority?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: High-piled combustible storage above the area/height thresholds triggers a CFC Chapter 32 permit and fire-protection requirements.
